questions.question_text_full:
Given below is a statement (Cause) followed by possible effects numbered I, II, and III. Read the ‘Cause’ carefully and decide which of the three can be a possible effect/s.

Cause: Many people in City X have reported receiving two electricity bills this month, instead of one.

Effects:
Effect I – The Electricity Board has published the details of areas where power shutdowns are expected tomorrow in City X.
Effect II – The municipal commissioner of City X has clarified that the technical glitch which led to multiple electricity bills being generated would be resolved within 48 hours.
Effect III – Long queues were seen outside the electricity board offices in many localities.

options.text: Only II is a possible effect.
Both I and II are possible effects.
Only I is a possible effect.
Both II and III are possible effects.

questions.notes: The options provided in the image are labeled a, b, c, d. These have been mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: In a certain code language, 'POSE' is coded as '3517' and 'SILK' is coded as '4638'. What is the code for 'S' in the given code language?

options.text: Not enough options provided in the source image to complete the set of 4.
